tagline: Certified Bay Area Landscape Design and Construction Firm

hero.headline:
Bay Area Landscapes Built to Last
Generations
hero.subheadline: Since 1978, Koch & Associates has transformed thousands of Bay Area backyards into breathtaking outdoor living spaces. From concept to completion under one roof, our master-builder approach means your project is designed and built by the same team — no miscommunication, no delays, just results you will love for decades.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> Design & Construction
services.subtitle: From elegant patios to resort-style pools, we handle every detail of your landscape transformation. One team, one vision, one exceptional result.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Build
cards.description: Custom landscape plans brought to life by the same team that designs them. Our master-builder approach eliminates miscommunication and delivers cohesive outdoor spaces.

cards.title: Pools & Spas
cards.description: Pool and spa construction integrated seamlessly with your surrounding landscape. From infinity edges to natural stone decking, we create backyard resort experiences.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Living
cards.description: Fully equipped outdoor kitchens with built-in grills, countertops, and dining areas designed for year-round Bay Area entertaining.

cards.title: Patios & Hardscaping
cards.description: Pavers, natural stone, flagstone, and decorative concrete crafted into durable patios, walkways, and retaining walls that anchor your landscape.

cards.title: Fire Features & Water Elements
cards.description: Custom fire pits, fireplaces, fountains, and water features that add warmth, movement, and ambiance to your outdoor gathering spaces.

cards.title: Pergolas & Shade Structures
cards.description: Modern louvered pergolas, arbors, and custom shade structures that provide adjustable comfort and architectural elegance to any outdoor area.

how_it_works.headline: Your Landscape Transformation in Three Steps

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Schedule a free on-site consultation at your home. We walk the space together, discuss your goals, budget, and style preferences, then create a detailed design concept.

steps.title: We Design & Build It
steps.description: Our master-builder team handles everything — design, permits, grading, construction, planting, irrigation, and lighting. One crew, one point of contact, zero headaches.

steps.title: Love Your Outdoor Space
steps.description: Step into a backyard that looks exactly like the plan — or better. We do a final walkthrough together and make sure every detail meets our Diamond Certified standard.

about.label: Why Bay Area Homeowners Choose Us
about.headline: Nearly 50 Years of Transforming Bay Area Backyards
about.description: Founded in 1978, Koch & Associates is one of the Bay Area's longest-running landscape design and construction firms. Our master-builder philosophy means you get one dedicated team from first sketch to final walkthrough — no subcontractor roulette, no finger-pointing, no surprises. Diamond Certified for six consecutive years and rated Highest in Quality, we treat every project with the care and craftsmanship that has earned us the trust of homeowners across Fremont, San Jose, San Mateo, and beyond.

features.title: Licensed & Insured Contractor
features.description: California licensed landscape contractor #500296 with full liability coverage. Your investment and property are always protected.

features.title: Master-Builder Approach
features.description: Design and construction handled by one integrated team. No miscommunication between designers and builders — just seamless execution.

features.title: Diamond Certified Quality
features.description: Rated Highest in Quality and Helpful Expertise for six straight years. We stand behind every project we build.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique — we provide detailed proposals with clear line items so you know exactly what you are investing in.

guarantee.headline: Our "Diamond Standard" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any element of your project does not meet the quality standards we promised, we will make it right at no additional cost. Period. We have built our reputation over nearly five decades by standing behind every stone, every plant, and every detail. Your satisfaction is not negotiable — it is our foundation.

faqs.question: How long does a typical landscape project take?
faqs.answer: Most residential projects take 4-12 weeks depending on scope. During your consultation, we provide a detailed timeline with milestones. Our integrated design-build approach actually shortens timelines because there is no handoff between separate design and construction teams.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits and HOA approvals?
faqs.answer: Yes, we manage the entire permitting process. As a licensed California contractor with 48 years of experience, we know Bay Area building codes inside and out and handle all submissions, inspections, and HOA coordination.

faqs.question: What areas of the Bay Area do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve communities across the greater Bay Area from our three offices in Fremont, San Jose, and San Mateo. This includes Campbell, Danville, Los Altos, Los Gatos, Menlo Park, Mountain View, Oakland, Palo Alto, Pleasanton, Saratoga, Sunnyvale, and surrounding areas.

faqs.question: Can I see examples of your past work?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We have an extensive portfolio of completed projects spanning nearly five decades. During your consultation we will share relevant examples that match your style and scope, and we are happy to provide references from past clients in your area.

faqs.question: What makes your master-builder approach different?
faqs.answer: Most companies separate design and construction into different teams or subcontractors. At Koch & Associates, the same team that designs your project builds it. This eliminates miscommunication, reduces costs, and ensures the finished result matches the vision exactly.

testimonials.name: Brian H.
testimonials.text: We are super pleased with the work, communications, design and professionalism of everyone at Koch & Associates. We did a complete redesign and remodel of our front and back yard. All of the stone work is fabulous.

testimonials.name: Greg S.
testimonials.text: They started on the day they said they would start. Scott took my ideas and vision and turned them into an amazing design that captured everything I was looking for.

testimonials.name: Cricket L.
testimonials.text: We couldn't be happier with the result. I wholeheartedly recommend them.
